ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the main referee for the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the shot was taken in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who took the shot */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the game when the shot was taken */,
  "minutes_remaining" INTEGER /* Minutes remaining in the period */,
  "seconds_remaining" INTEGER /* Seconds remaining in the period */,
  "shot_made_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the shot was made (1) or not (0) */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., layup, dunk, jump shot) */,
  "shot_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the shot from the basket */,
  "x" INTEGER /* x-coordinate of the shot on the court */,
  "y" INTEGER /* y-coordinate of the shot on the court */,
  "shot_2pnt" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the shot is a 2-point shot (True) or not (False) */,
  "shot_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shot type */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action type */,
  "assist_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who assisted the shot, if applicable */,
  "block_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who blocked the shot, if applicable */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds resulting from the shot */,
  "foul_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a foul was committed during the shot */,
  "shot_value" INTEGER /* Point value of the shot (2 or 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_shot_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("shot_type_id") REFERENCES shot_types ("shot_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shot_types" (
  "shot_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot type */,
  "shot_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the shot type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shot type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player in the game */,
  "shots_taken" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player in the game */,
  "shots_made" INTEGER /* Number of shots made by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rebounds by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total number of steals by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total number of blocks by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total number of turnovers by the player in the game */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total number of fouls committed by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
